chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI C.P.No.S-115 of 2024 Date Order with signature of the Judge 1. For order on CMA 1460/2024 2. For hearing of CMA 1461/2024, 3. For hearing of main case. 04.09.2024. Mr. Muhammad Faisal Khan, advocate for petitioner Mr. Ahmed Masood, advocate for respondent = Learned counsel for petitioner after arguing the case at some length submits that he would not press this petition on merits if some time is granted to the petitioner to vacate the demised premises viz. shops No.27- 29 & 53-55, Madina Centre, Fatima Jinnah Road, Saddar Karachi. Learned counsel for landlord/respondent in this regard has proposed two months but as a sheer indulgence, six months’ time from today is granted to the petitioner to vacate the premises. Either within six months or exactly on expiry of six months from today, the petitioner shall vacate the premises subject to payment of rent and all dues without any further notice. Accordingly, this petition is dismissed as not pressed alongwith listed applications in the above terms. JUDGE A.K
